message:
feat(atc): add ATC_WRITE_MODE env var with off/shadow/live gating (br-bn0vb.18)

Add AtcWriteMode enum (off/shadow/live) to config, parsed from
AM_ATC_WRITE_MODE env var (default: off). Gate all atc_note_* functions:
- off: early return, no engine lock
- shadow: acquire engine lock for enabled() check, emit TRACE span
  with would-insert payload, then return without persisting
- live: existing behavior (persist to engine)

Includes 3 config tests for parsing, env override, and default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
